title: Replace Option<Option<T>> with Patch<T> enum
description:
Option<Option<T>> appears in 10 fields across 4 update structs. A caller writing Some(None) to clear a field looks like a bug. Replace with a Patch<T> enum:

pub enum Patch<T> { Keep, Set(T), Clear }

- Keep: field absent from JSON patch (no change)
- Set(v): field present with value
- Clear: field present as null (clears nullable spec field)

Derive Default as Patch::Keep. Affected structs:
- ChatUpdateInput: mute_until, description, avatar_blob_id
- PresenceStatusSetInput: status_text, status_emoji, expires_at
- ChatContactSetInput: display_name, nick
- SpaceUpdateInput: description, icon_blob_id

The Patch type must also implement From<T> for ergonomic Set usage and should live in types or a new patch module.
